name: pf
description: Fork of academic-research-skills v3.15.0 (Cheng-I Wu, CC-BY-NC 4.0) with a research-bench localization bridge: /pf:dossier-bridge turns rf direction dossiers (claims, novelty file, adversarial review) into a materials brief the ARS writing pipeline consumes. Production-grade academic research pipeline for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize. 4 skills, 27 modes, 39-agent ensemble, L3 claim-faithfulness gate, cross-index triangulation, deterministic citation verification gate. Upstream provenance: see UPSTREAM.md.
